health.note: Same repo as FlashFlow, behind by 3 commits

findings.symptom: API keys in plaintext files with no .gitignore in OpenClaw workspace
findings.root_cause: Workspace initialized without .gitignore; files are untracked but one git add . pushes to public GitHub repo
findings.impact: Credential leak to public GitHub - Late.dev, Google SA, Brave keys all exposed
findings.fix: Add .gitignore with *.txt, *.json, *.key patterns. Rotate all exposed keys immediately.

findings.symptom: check-renders cron has NO CRON_SECRET authorization check
findings.root_cause: Route wrapped with withErrorCapture but CRON_SECRET guard never added

evidence.snippet: export const GET = withErrorCapture(async () => { // no CRON_SECRET check

findings.impact: Anyone can trigger render polling against external APIs, manipulate video pipeline state
findings.fix: Add standard CRON_SECRET check at top of handler

findings.symptom: Scheduled posts IDOR - any authenticated user can read/modify/delete any user's posts
findings.root_cause: Routes query scheduled_posts without filtering by user_id

evidence.snippet: GET by ID - no user_id filter

findings.impact: Cross-user data access and modification
findings.fix: Add .eq('user_id', user.id) to all queries

findings.symptom: Admin routes missing admin role check - any authenticated user can trigger
findings.root_cause: Routes rely on UI layout gating instead of API-level auth

evidence.snippet: No admin check - triggers Vercel deployments
No admin check - exports all video data

findings.impact: Privilege escalation - non-admin users can trigger deployments and export all data
findings.fix: Add role !== 'admin' check returning 403

findings.symptom: 23 tables have NO Row Level Security enabled
findings.root_cause: RLS never enabled on these tables in migrations

evidence.snippet: video_events (69 refs), posting_accounts (9), proven_hooks (16), audit_log (4), + 19 more

findings.impact: Any authenticated user can read/write these tables directly via client-side Supabase
findings.fix: Migration to enable RLS + add workspace_id/user_id scoped policies

findings.symptom: TikTok OAuth tokens stored in plain text (4 tables)
findings.root_cause: Encryption pattern from Drive tokens never applied to TikTok

evidence.snippet: access_token TEXT NOT NULL, refresh_token TEXT NOT NULL

findings.impact: DB compromise exposes all TikTok tokens. Drive tokens properly encrypted via AES-256-GCM.
findings.fix: Apply same lib/security/crypto.ts encryption pattern. Add encrypted columns, migrate, drop plain.

findings.symptom: 6 features gated in UI but API routes have no plan check
findings.root_cause: Plan enforcement only in frontend PlanGate component, not in API handlers
findings.impact: Free-tier users bypass paid features via direct API calls
findings.fix: Add assertMinPlan to each API route

findings.symptom: Job queue has no row-level locking - concurrent process-jobs invocations double-execute
findings.root_cause: Simple SELECT WHERE status=pending without FOR UPDATE SKIP LOCKED
findings.impact: Duplicate AI calls, duplicate DB writes
findings.fix: Add FOR UPDATE SKIP LOCKED to job claim query

findings.symptom: Stripe checkout metadata key mismatch - legacy route uses wrong keys
findings.root_cause: /api/stripe/checkout uses userId/tier, webhook expects user_id/plan_id
findings.impact: Checkouts via legacy route silently fail to provision subscriptions
findings.fix: Fix metadata keys or delete legacy route (canonical: /api/subscriptions/checkout)

findings.symptom: Google Drive service account uses full drive scope instead of drive.file
findings.root_cause: Broad scope specified in client initialization
findings.impact: Service account has full read/write/delete access to all Drive files
findings.fix: Change to drive.file scope

findings.symptom: Ghost cron entry - nightly-reset defined in vercel.json but route file missing
findings.root_cause: Route was removed but vercel.json entry remains
findings.impact: Vercel fires a 404 every day at 05:05 UTC
findings.fix: Remove from vercel.json or create the route

findings.symptom: content_items.short_id has no UNIQUE constraint
findings.root_cause: Only plain index created, not unique index
findings.impact: 6-char hex prefix collisions silently accepted
findings.fix: CREATE UNIQUE INDEX

findings.symptom: Two divergent clones of tts-engine repo
findings.root_cause: HTTPS clone at ~/tts-engine behind SSH clone at /Volumes/WorkSSD
findings.impact: Work in wrong clone causes merge conflicts or lost work
findings.fix: Delete one clone, symlink

findings.symptom: Mission Control has large uncommitted delta (10 modified + 17 untracked files)
findings.root_cause: New routes and pages developed but never committed
findings.impact: Significant functionality vulnerable to data loss
findings.fix: Commit and push

findings.symptom: 23 of 34 cron routes lack Sentry error capture
findings.root_cause: withErrorCapture wrapper not applied consistently

evidence.snippet: Only 11 of 34 routes use error capture

findings.impact: Silent failures in 23 crons only visible in Vercel logs
findings.fix: Wrap remaining routes with withErrorCapture

findings.symptom: No content item status transition enforcement
findings.root_cause: Validates status is valid enum but allows any transition

evidence.snippet: Status validated as enum, no transition check

findings.impact: Items can jump from briefing to posted or regress backwards
findings.fix: Add transition map and validate oldStatus -> newStatus

findings.symptom: 6 confirmed N+1 query patterns in production routes
findings.root_cause: Sequential DB calls inside loops instead of batched queries
findings.impact: Linear performance degradation with data growth
findings.fix: Batch with .in() filters or RPC functions

findings.symptom: Two duplicate Drive folder endpoints with different lib imports
findings.root_cause: drive-folder and drive/ensure routes created independently
findings.impact: Confusion about which endpoint to use; potentially inconsistent behavior
findings.fix: Consolidate to one endpoint

findings.symptom: No AI spending cap or budget enforcement
findings.root_cause: Usage tracked but no circuit breaker when costs exceed threshold
findings.impact: Single user could exhaust API credits
findings.fix: Add per-user daily/monthly credit limit enforcement

findings.symptom: CORS allows all origins
findings.root_cause: Middleware sets Access-Control-Allow-Origin: *
findings.impact: Any website can make requests if session cookie allows
findings.fix: Whitelist production domains

consolidation.recommendation: Merge into single Content Calendar with calendar/queue toggle
Merge into Production Board with Videos/Content Items tabs
Delete 5 orphan pages, consolidate 3 nav pages into tabs
